'use strict'; var test = require('tape'); var parse = require('../').parse; test('parse shell commands', function (t) { t.same(parse(''), [], 'parses an empty string'); t['throws']( function () { parse('${}'); }, Error, 'empty substitution throws' ); t['throws']( function () { parse('${'); }, Error, 'incomplete substitution throws' ); t.same(parse('a \'b\' "c"'), ['a', 'b', 'c']); t.same( parse('beep "boop" \'foo bar baz\' "it\'s \\"so\\" groovy"'), ['beep', 'boop', 'foo bar baz', 'it\'s "so" groovy'] ); t.same(parse('a b\\ c d'), ['a', 'b c', 'd']); t.same(parse('\\$beep bo\\`op'), ['$beep', 'bo`op']); t.same(parse('echo "foo = \\"foo\\""'), ['echo', 'foo = "foo"']); t.same(parse(''), []); t.same(parse(' '), []); t.same(parse('\t'), []); t.same(parse('a"b c d"e'), ['ab c de']); t.same(parse('a\\ b"c d"\\ e f'), ['a bc d e', 'f']); t.same(parse('a\\ b"c d"\\ e\'f g\' h'), ['a bc d ef g', 'h']); t.same(parse("x \"bl'a\"'h'"), ['x', "bl'ah"]); t.same(parse("x bl^'a^'h'", {}, { escape: '^' }), ['x', "bl'a'h"]); t.same(parse('abcH def', {}, { escape: 'H' }), ['abc def']); t.deepEqual(parse('# abc def ghi'), [{ comment: ' abc def ghi' }], 'start-of-line comment content is unparsed'); t.deepEqual(parse('xyz # abc def ghi'), ['xyz', { comment: ' abc def ghi' }], 'comment content is unparsed'); t.deepEqual(parse('-x "" -y'), ['-x', '', '-y'], 'empty string is preserved'); t.end(); });
